## Outcome

## Acceptance criteria

<!-- Testable, checkable statements. This is what the acceptance audit scores. -->

## Doc delta

<!-- Which docs change first (requirements/spec/API/schema/events), or "none". -->

## Dependencies

<!-- Stories or decisions that must land before this one can start. -->

## Definition of Ready

- [ ] Acceptance criteria are clear and testable
- [ ] Doc delta identified
- [ ] Dependencies known and either closed or sequenced
- [ ] Roughly sized (fits in one iteration; splits into releasable PRs if larger)
